skill.name: antigravity-workflows
skill.description: Orchestrate multiple Antigravity skills through guided workflows for SaaS MVP delivery, security audits, AI agent builds, and browser QA.
skill.summary: Orchestrate multiple Antigravity skills through guided workflows for SaaS MVP delivery, security aud...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 20 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The scanner incorrectly flagged YAML frontmatter as cryptographic code and markdown code fences as shell commands. The skill contains only documentation and workflow guidance - no executable code, no shell commands, no cryptographic operations. This is a safe workflow orchestration skill.

low_findings.title: False Positive: External Commands Detection
low_findings.description: Scanner detected 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' in SKILL.md but these are markdown code fences (```) used for formatting, not shell command operators. No actual command execution exists in this skill.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: Scanner incorrectly flagged YAML frontmatter (description field) and plain text safety guidelines as cryptographic code. No cryptographic operations exist in this skill.

content.value_statement: Complex multi-step tasks require coordinating many skills. This skill automatically sequences skill invocations with validation checkpoints.
actual_capabilities: Route user requests to appropriate workflow templates
Execute multi-phase workflows with step-by-step guidance
Validate completion criteria before proceeding to next step
Coordinate multiple specialized skills in sequence
Provide structured completion reports with artifacts and risks
Handle missing skills gracefully with fallback recommendations
limitations: Does not execute code directly - orchestrates other skills only
Requires referenced skills to be installed locally
Cannot guarantee success without proper environment and credentials
Stack-specific skills may require matching skill in repository

use_cases.title: Ship a SaaS MVP
use_cases.description: Complete guided workflow from planning through deployment with validation at each phase.
use_cases.target_user: Startup founders and developers building new products

use_cases.title: Run a Security Audit
use_cases.description: Execute comprehensive security review workflow with authorization checks and risk reporting.

use_cases.title: Build an AI Agent System
use_cases.description: Guided workflow for constructing AI agent architectures with checkpoint validation.
use_cases.target_user: AI engineers and product teams building agent products

prompt_templates.title: Start SaaS MVP Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows to run the "Ship a SaaS MVP" workflow for my project idea.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to build and ship a new SaaS product

prompt_templates.title: Run Security Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows and execute a full "Security Audit for a Web App" workflow.

prompt_templates.title: Build AI Agent
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows to guide me through "Build an AI Agent System" with checkpoints.
prompt_templates.scenario: User is building an AI agent or LLM-powered product

prompt_templates.title: Browser Automation QA
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows to execute the "QA and Browser Automation" workflow and stabilize flaky tests.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs E2E testing and browser automation

output_examples.input: Use @antigravity-workflows to run the "Ship a SaaS MVP" workflow
output_examples.output:
I'll guide you through the SaaS MVP workflow. Let me confirm the scope first:

**Phase 1: Planning**
- Define core features
- Identify technical stack
- Create milestone checklist

Shall we begin with Phase 1?

Starting Security Audit Workflow.

**Step 1: Reconnaissance**
- Identifying attack surfaces
- Mapping endpoints and dependencies

[Proceeding to vulnerability scanning...]

best_practices: Confirm scope and objectives before starting any workflow
Validate each step completion before proceeding to the next
Review artifacts and open risks at workflow completion
anti_patterns: Skipping validation steps to move faster
Assuming all required skills are available without checking
Running destructive actions without explicit user approval

faq.question: What skills does this skill orchestrate?
faq.answer: This skill coordinates other Antigravity skills like concise-planning, brainstorming, workflow-automation, and verification-before-completion.

faq.question: Does this skill execute code directly?
faq.answer: No. This is a workflow orchestrator that guides the AI to invoke other skills in sequence. It does not execute code itself.

faq.question: What happens if a required skill is missing?
faq.answer: The skill will state the gap and recommend falling back to the closest available skill.

faq.question: Can I customize workflows?
faq.answer: Yes, you can modify the workflow definitions in docs/WORKFLOWS.md or data/workflows.json.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for production deployments?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance but success depends on your environment, credentials, and infrastructure availability.

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
